ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON JUL-06-2005 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO SPECIALLY SET TRIAL DATE PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A) WAS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 10/24/05 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 10/14/05 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 304. PATHOLOGY TO BE PROVIDED BY 7/20/05. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT APPLIES. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE ALL PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AND CAUSATION WITNESSES AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 8/26/05, AND SHALL ALSO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS THEY INTEND TO USE AT TRIAL AS TO PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY THAT DATE. IF PLAINTIFF LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED ON THE DUE DATE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE ROBERT L. DONDERO, CLERKS: V.MU/D. LOK, REPORTER: JOANN BRYCE, #3321 (206)

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Roger Gold for plaintiff and moving party Cecil Luginbill, Barbara Luginbill

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. After hearing, Plaintiff's motion to compel the deposition of the person most knowledgeable / custodian of records of Gould Pumps is granted. The deposition and document production is to take place telephonically or in upstate New York. The scope of the deposition shall be limited to the years 1942 - 1955 for Fletcher class vessels.
